name: environmental_policy_ransomware_incident_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Environmental Policy, the situation tagged internally around environmental policy ransomware incident kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Harper Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Harper Vasquez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environmental Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Soren Berg
agents.identity: I am Soren Berg, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Environmental Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Harper Vasquez must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Harper Vasquez do?
